title: ITI Jobs 2026 – Group B (NG) & Group C
org: Sub-Inspector (Executive/PMT/FS/Master/GD), Constable (Executive/Bandsmen/GD/Wireless/Driver etc.), Radio Operator (ASI), Radio Technician (ASI), Firemen, Follower posts & others
location: Andaman and Nicobar Island, Andaman and Nicobar Islands
shortInfo: The Andaman & Nicobar Police has released 495 vacancies for Group B (NG) and Group C posts. Eligible candidates with qualifications such as 10th, 12th, ITI, Diploma, B.Sc, B.E./B.Tech, or Bachelor’s Degree can apply online. The last date to submit the online application has been extended up to 10-06-2026 at andamannicobar.gov.in

basic_details.job_title: Andaman & Nicobar Police Constable Recruitment 2026 Notification out - Apply Online for 495 Group B (NG) & Group C Posts
basic_details.post_name: Sub-Inspector (Executive/PMT/FS/Master/GD), Constable (Executive/Bandsmen/GD/Wireless/Driver etc.), Radio Operator (ASI), Radio Technician (ASI), Firemen, Follower posts & others
basic_details.short_information: The Andaman & Nicobar Police has released 495 vacancies for Group B (NG) and Group C posts. Eligible candidates with qualifications such as 10th, 12th, ITI, Diploma, B.Sc, B.E./B.Tech, or Bachelor’s Degree can apply online. The last date to submit the online application has been extended up to 10-06-2026 at andamannicobar.gov.in
basic_details.job_location: Andaman and Nicobar Island, Andaman and Nicobar Islands

application_fee.details: Candidates (except Female/ST candidates who are exempted from payment of fee) are required to pay a fee of Rs. 100/- (Rupees one hundred only) No Fee for ST/Women candidates of any community. No "fee exemption" is available to Gen/OBC/EWS male candidates and they are required to pay the full prescribed fee. After completing payment: candidate has to upload the transaction slip in the portal in image format.

age_limit.maximum_age: Varies by post (18-30 years for most SI posts; 18-25/33 years for Constable/Follower posts) as on 17/05/2026
age_limit.age_details: Varies by post (18-30 years for most SI posts; 18-25/33 years for Constable/Follower posts) as on 17/05/2026

qualification.education_qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, ITI, 12TH, 10TH
qualification.details: Nationality: Candidate must be a citizen of India. Essential Educational Qualification (as on 17/05/2026) (Varies by post – Graduate / Higher Secondary / Matric Level) Graduate Level Posts (e.g., Sub-Inspector (Executive), Radio Operator (ASI), etc.): Bachelor’s Degree in relevant discipline + valid driving license (LMV) in most cases. Higher Secondary Level Posts (e.g., Constable (Executive), Sub-Inspector (Master), etc.): 12th Pass + specific technical/skill requirements. Matric Level Posts (e.g., Fitter Electrician, Diesel Mechanic, Follower posts): 10th Pass + ITI/NTC/NAC in relevant trade + experience + driving license where applicable. Desirable Qualifications mentioned for some posts (e.g., Fire Service experience, Sub-Officer Course).

how_to_apply: Download Andaman & Nicobar Police Recruitment 2026 Detailed Advertisement PDF
important_instructions: Ensure eligibility (age, education, physical standards, driving license, trade skills) as on 17/05/2026.
Some posts are open only for Male candidates.
PM&ET and Trade Test are qualifying in nature.
Govt. strives for gender balance; women candidates are encouraged to apply.
SSC / A&N Police reserves right to modify/cancel the recruitment.
Check official website regularly for updates on exam dates, admit cards, etc.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Andaman & Nicobar Police Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for Andaman & Nicobar Police Recruitment 2026 is 10 June 2026. Candidates must complete the application process before the deadline. Late applications will not be accepted under any circumstances.

faq.question: How many vacancies are announced in Andaman & Nicobar Police 2026 recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 495 tentative vacancies have been announced for Group-B (Non-Gazetted) and Group-C posts. These vacancies are distributed across multiple departments and units. The final number may vary as per official updates.

faq.question: What is the eligibility qualification for Andaman & Nicobar Police 2026?
faq.answer: The educational qualification varies by post, ranging from 10th, 12th, to Graduation. Technical posts may require ITI or specific trade certificates. Candidates must meet all eligibility conditions as per the notification.

faq.question: What is the age limit for Andaman & Nicobar Police Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit varies depending on the post, generally between 18 to 30 or 33 years. The crucial date for age calculation is 17 May 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: What is the application fee for Andaman & Nicobar Police 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹100 for General, OBC, and EWS male candidates. Female and ST candidates are exempted from paying the fee. Candidates must upload the payment transaction slip after fee submission.

faq.question: What is the selection process for Andaman & Nicobar Police Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Physical Measurement & Endurance Test, Written Exam, and Trade Test. Candidates must qualify each stage to proceed further. Final merit is based on performance in the written exam and skill tests.

faq.question: What is the salary for Andaman & Nicobar Police posts in 2026?
faq.answer: The salary varies by post, starting from Level 1 to Level 6 pay scales. Sub-Inspector posts offer higher pay, while constable and follower posts have lower pay levels. Additional benefits like DA, HRA, and medical facilities are included.

faq.question: How can I apply for Andaman & Nicobar Police Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the official recruitment portal of Andaman & Nicobar Police. They need to fill in details, upload documents, and submit the form. It is important to complete the process before the deadline.

faq.question: Is there any physical test in Andaman & Nicobar Police recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must undergo a Physical Measurement and Endurance Test (PM&ET). This includes activities like running, long jump, and other physical standards. It is qualifying in nature and mandatory for most posts.

faq.question: What documents are required for Andaman & Nicobar Police 2026 application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to upload documents such as educational certificates, ID proof, and photograph. Additional documents like caste certificate, driving license, or experience certificate may be required. All documents must be valid and verified during selection.
